THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOSTER, VERNER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 930 BRUSSELS SAN FRANCISCO, CA $500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, 10PM. DEFT. TO PAY $100/MO AT THE END OF EACH MONTH STARTING 9/30/93 - 1/31/94; IF DEFT. MISSES ANY PAYMENT, THE FULL BALANCE WILL IMMEDIATELY BECOME DUE.
